titleStmt.title: SII 41.146: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 146. (A.R. No. 145 of 1905.) Veñjamāṅgūḍalūr, Karur Taluk, Tiruchirāppaḷḷi District. On the north wall of the central shrine in the Vikritisvara temple at Veñjamāṅgūḍalūr.

p.hi: Koṅgu Kōṉērinmaikoṇḍāṉ Year 10 = c. 13th-14th century A.D.

summary.p: The king converted a village called Muttāyam in Veṅgāla-nāḍu that was lying waste as tax-free dēvadāna of the temple. A number of taxes exempted are given. The village was named as Rājākkaḷtambirāṉ-nallūr. The officers Kachchirāyaṉ, Viḻuppādarāyaṉ and Kāliṅgarāyaṉ signed the order.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvaṉaccakravatti koṉerimai koṇṭāṉ veṅkālanāṭṭu tiruveñcamākkūṭaluṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil tāṉattāṟku
Iṉṉāyaṉāṟku Amutupaṭi Uḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭum viñcaṉaṅkaḷukkum tirunāḷukkum veṅkāla nāṭṭu neṭunāḷ pāḻpaṭṭukkiṭanta muttāya
m vūrnattam nāṉkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa nīrnilamum karuñce puṉceyum nattamum toṭṭamum kuḷamuṅ kuḷappa(r)rippum Uṭpaṭṭanilat
til paḻantevatāṉam paḷḷiccantam nikki nikkiṉiṉṟa nilattukku Oṭṭaiccu Ārāṭci nattavariyum maṇṭala mutalmaica
ntu vikkirakappeṟumutaleḻuttu viṉiyokamum Elavaiyukavai kāṇikkai kāliṅkarāyaṉ viṉiyokam vācal vi
ṉiyokamum niṉaippu viṉiyokam Olaiccampaṭam Aṇiyiṭuvāṉvariyum veḷaikkāṟar ciṟukkaṉkaḷ kāttikaippaṭi
yum cimāṉ makaḻmai nallerutu naṟpacu kāṇam ney Eṇṇai Uppāyamum taṟiyiṟai cekkiṟai taṭṭoli pāṭṭamum Īḻampuñce pāṟaikkāṇamum
kiḻiṟai toloṭṭu maṉṟupāṭu teṇṭakuṟṟamum maṟṟumeṟpeṭṭa varikaḷum Uṭpaṭapattāvatu Āṭimāta mutal tevatā
ṉayiṟaiyiliyākattantom Ippaṭikku nāṉkellaiyilum tirucculattilum nāṭṭi cantirātittavaṟ celvatāka
kkalliluñ cempilum veṭṭik koṇṭu Ivūr Irācākkaḷtampirāṉ nallūr neṉṟu kuṭiyeṟṟi Aṉubhavikka Ivai kacciyarāyaṉ E
ḻuttu yāṇṭu 10vatu nāḷ 3 10 Ivai viḻuppātarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai kāliṅkarāyaṉ Eḻuttu .§ śupamastu .
Digital edition of SII 41.146 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
